basic_details.job_title: Auraiya UP Anganwadi Worker & Helper Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 473 Posts
basic_details.department: Office of the District Programme Officer, Auraiya
basic_details.short_information: The Office of the District Programme Officer, Auraiya (Uttar Pradesh) has released a notification for direct recruitment to honorarium-based vacant posts of Anganwadi Karyakatri (Worker) and Anganwadi Sahayika (Helper). This recruitment covers Child Development Projects running in both rural and urban areas of Auraiya district, and is open only to women candidates.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 01 July 2026 Last Date for Online Application: 28 July 2026, till midnight 12:00 AM

qualification.details: Only women candidates are eligible for the posts of Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper. Minimum educational qualification is Intermediate (12th) or equivalent. Selection will be merit-based, determined by the maximum marks obtained in Intermediate. The candidate must be a permanent resident of the ward/gram sabha from which she is applying. As on 01 July 2026, the candidate's age must be a minimum of 18 years and not more than 35 years. The date of birth recorded in the High School marksheet/certificate will be considered valid for age verification. Only digitally signed online caste, residence, and income certificates issued by the Tehsil, which can be verified online, will be accepted. Reservation will follow applicable government orders relating to Scheduled Castes/Scheduled Tribes and Other Backward Classes. As per government order, a Worker and Helper from the same family will not be eligible for selection at the same Anganwadi centre.

how_to_apply: Thoroughly read the government orders and other instructions available on the website.
Fill out the online application form within the specified timeframe (offline applications will not be accepted under any circumstances).
Upload the required documents (educational certificates, caste/residence/income certificates, etc.).
Carefully verify all entries before submitting the form.
Note: If any error is found in the application, or if any facts/figures/marks obtained/total marks in educational records are found to be incorrect or fabricated, the candidature will be rejected.

rows.information: Office of the District Programme Officer, Auraiya

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Release Date: 01 July 2026 Last Date for Online Application: 28 July 2026, till midnight 12:00 AM

content_sections.heading: Project-wise Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: Note: The complete village/ward-wise vacancy list along with reservation details is available at the District Collectorate, Vikas Bhawan, Tehsil, and Development Block offices' notice boards, and on the official department website.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria & Key Conditions
content_sections.text: Only women candidates are eligible for the posts of Anganwadi Worker and Anganwadi Helper. Minimum educational qualification is Intermediate (12th) or equivalent . Selection will be merit-based, determined by the maximum marks obtained in Intermediate. The candidate must be a permanent resident of the ward/gram sabha from which she is applying. As on 01 July 2026, the candidate's age must be a minimum of 18 years and not more than 35 years. The date of birth recorded in the High School marksheet/certificate will be considered valid for age verification. Only digitally signed online caste, residence, and income certificates issued by the Tehsil, which can be verified online, will be accepted. Reservation will follow applicable government orders relating to Scheduled Castes/Scheduled Tribes and Other Backward Classes. As per government order, a Worker and Helper from the same family will not be eligible for selection at the same Anganwadi centre.

content_sections.heading: Selection Preference Order
content_sections.text: Selection will follow this order of preference: Widowed BPL candidate from the same gram sabha/ward (urban area). Divorced or deserted BPL candidate from the same gram sabha/ward. BPL candidate from the same gram sabha/ward. Widowed APL candidate from the same gram sabha/ward. Divorced or deserted APL candidate from the same gram sabha/ward. APL candidate from the same gram sabha/ward.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Auraiya Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official website: https://upanganwadibharti.in Thoroughly read the government orders and other instructions available on the website. Fill out the online application form within the specified timeframe (offline applications will not be accepted under any circumstances). Upload the required documents (educational certificates, caste/residence/income certificates, etc.). Carefully verify all entries before submitting the form. Note: If any error is found in the application, or if any facts/figures/marks obtained/total marks in educational records are found to be incorrect or fabricated, the candidature will be rejected.

faq.question: Q1. What is Auraiya Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Auraiya Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 has been announced by the Office of the District Programme Officer, Auraiya, Uttar Pradesh for the recruitment of Anganwadi Workers and Anganwadi Helpers. A total of 473 vacancies have been notified under various Child Development Projects. Eligible women candidates can submit their applications online through the official portal before the last date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Auraiya Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 473 vacancies in total, including 292 Anganwadi Worker posts and 181 Anganwadi Helper posts. The vacancies are distributed across rural and urban projects such as Achhalda, Bidhuna, Sahar, Ajitmal, Bhagyanagar, Auraiya Rural, and Auraiya City. Candidates should check the official notification for village-wise and reservation-wise vacancy details.

faq.question: Q3. Who is eligible to apply for Auraiya Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only women candidates are eligible to apply for the Anganwadi Worker and Helper posts. Applicants must have passed Intermediate (12th) or an equivalent examination from a recognized board. Additionally, the candidate must be a permanent resident of the ward or Gram Sabha from which she is applying.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Auraiya Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be 18 to 35 years of age as on 01 July 2026. The date of birth mentioned in the High School certificate or marksheet will be considered final for age verification. Applicants should ensure they meet the prescribed age criteria before submitting the application.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for Auraiya Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be completely merit-based and will depend on the marks obtained in the Intermediate (12th) examination. There will be no written examination or interview. Preference will also be given to eligible BPL, widowed, divorced, and deserted women candidates according to the government guidelines.

faq.question: Q6. What are the important dates for Auraiya Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification was released on 01 July 2026, and the online application process is currently open. The last date to submit the online application is 28 July 2026, up to 12:00 AM (midnight). Candidates should apply well before the deadline to avoid technical issues.

faq.question: Q7. What documents are required for Auraiya Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must upload their Intermediate (12th) certificate, High School certificate for age proof, and digitally signed caste, residence, and income certificates issued by the Tehsil. All certificates must be verifiable online. Incorrect or fake documents may result in rejection of the application.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for Auraiya Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to visit the official UP Anganwadi Recruitment website and complete the online registration process. They should carefully fill in the application form, upload all required documents, verify the entered details, and submit the application before the closing date. Offline applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for Auraiya Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for submitting the online application. Candidates are advised to read the official notification carefully for the latest instructions and any updates related to the recruitment process before applying.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from other districts apply for Auraiya Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. Candidates must be permanent residents of the concerned ward or Gram Sabha from which they are applying. Women belonging to other districts or those who do not satisfy the local residence requirement will not be considered eligible for the recruitment process.
